claims.claim: `ResonanceDensityV1::from_parts` should enforce a baseline viscosity floor under high pressure even when supplied viscosity is low.
`viscosity_coupling_coefficient` should remain sensitive to structural plurality rather than saturating into a static value.
`viscosity_vector_v1` should not deadlock flow under high static friction, high persistence, or zero-flow-like probes.
claims.evidence_plan: Run/link no-deadlock and monotonic flow-rate viscosity-vector tests.
